major.intro: Rewatch the Major playoffs in 2D, match by match. The demos are already parsed and live in the project repo: hit watch and the replay is downloaded on the spot.

extension.title: Download Faceit demos
extension.tagline: A Chrome extension that downloads your Faceit match demos straight from the browser. Just open the match page and the 2D replay is ready here, without leaving the site.
extension.featureDownloadBody: Open a match page on Faceit and download the demo right there, with no link hunting and no API key.
extension.featureLocalBody: The demo is parsed locally, in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server: the files never leave your device.
extension.featureLibraryBody: Downloaded demos are kept in your browser, ready to reopen and analyze whenever you want.

about.title: About the project
about.tagline: A 2D replay viewer for Counter-Strike 2 demos that runs entirely in your browser.
about.motivationPoint1: The tools that already exist have far too much friction for the end user.
about.motivationPoint2: I needed something to analyze the communication of PUG matches with my friends.
about.motivationPoint3: I really want to build a business in esports, a field I have always admired. This was a project where I could give back to the CS2 community, a game I have played since I was a kid. And I still plan to build more innovative and advanced projects.
about.authorBody: Built by {name}, a developer from Brazil. The project is open-source precisely so it can grow with the community's support: suggestions, ideas and bug reports are very welcome on GitHub.
about.creditsBody: This project stands on the shoulders of great open-source work:
about.relatedBody: Projects that inspired this one and are worth checking out:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.tagline: The short version: this app runs entirely in your browser and collects no personal data.
privacy.localBody: When you open a demo, it is processed locally in your browser (via WebAssembly). The file is never sent to any server: it never leaves your device.
privacy.storageBody: So the recent demos list works and your preferences (like the language) are remembered, we keep some data only in your browser's local storage. It stays on your device and can be cleared anytime by clearing the site data.
privacy.analyticsBody: Today the app uses no analytics and no tracking cookies. In the future, we may add a privacy-friendly analytics tool, only to understand how many visits the site gets: aggregated and anonymous, without collecting personal data or building user profiles. If that changes, this page will be updated.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: The app is hosted as a static site. Some images (like the map radars) and the Major replays are loaded from public sources such as GitHub. To deliver those files, those services may log requests (for example, your IP address) under their own privacy policies.
privacy.contactBody: Questions about privacy? Reach me at {email}.

seo.appDescription: 2D replay viewer for Counter-Strike 2 demos that runs entirely in your browser: your demos never leave your machine.

analyzer.title: Analyze demo
analyzer.subtitleB: file from CS2 and rewatch the match in 2D, round by round. Everything runs locally, in your browser.
analyzer.recentNote: History is kept only in your browser. Reopening a demo does not re-upload it.
analyzer.localNote: Processing happens in your browser. The demo is not sent to any server.
analyzer.importHint: A .cs2dv file exported from this app

viewer.autoZoomDesc: Frames all players on the map
viewer.lowQualityEffectsDesc: Draws smokes and molotovs as plain circles, for weaker devices
viewer.autoAdvanceDesc: When a round ends, the next one starts on its own
viewer.skipFreezeDesc: When switching rounds, start right after the freeze time

comment.modeHint: Click the map to leave a comment

coach.modeHint: Pick a tool and draw on the map

grenades.empty: No grenades for the current filters.
grenades.hint: Hover a grenade to isolate its trajectory · click to open it in the replay

utilities.empty: No utility data for this demo.

flash.matrixHint: Row blinded column: total duration in seconds (allies included)
flash.empty: This demo records no blind events. GOTV/HLTV demos (such as Majors) usually omit this information, so flash stats cannot be computed. This is not an error.
flash.impactHint: Enemies blinded who died while blind from your flash (real payoff)

damage.hint: Damage from HE and molotov (utility kills included)

heatmap.title: Heatmap
heatmap.multiLevelNote: {map} has two floors: each plot shows one level.

economy.startMoneyHint: Cash available at the start of each round, before buying
economy.equipValueHint: Value each team has equipped in the round (weapons, utility and armor)
